summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Peptimancer AI-powered peptide architect. Backend APIs working excellently with GPT-4 integration. Frontend form submission, loading states, and results display all functioning correctly. Only minor backend validation issue found.

minor_bugs.issue: Invalid amino acid sequences return 200 status with empty analogues instead of 400 error
minor_bugs.impact: Frontend receives successful response for invalid input, but analogues array is empty
minor_bugs.expected_behavior: Should return 400 Bad Request for invalid sequences

passed_tests: Frontend page loading and UI rendering
Loading state display during AI generation
Button state management (disabled for invalid input)
Error handling for empty and invalid sequences
GPT-4 AI integration generating peptide analogues
Results showing modification details, IP risk, and novelty scores
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix minor backend validation issue where invalid amino acid sequences return 200 instead of 400 status code. Current workaround: Frontend handles empty analogues array correctly.
